ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1601. Professor of medicine and philosophy at the Paduan Studio. In the Academy he discussed about laughter and crying, and delevered an oration in honour of Pietro Duodo, Captain of Padua.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
